description: The National Trust Party (Hezb-e E'temad-e Melli) was founded in 2005 by [Mehdi Karroubi](/people/mehdi-karroubi) after he came third in the first round of the presidential election that year. It positioned itself as a reformist but pragmatic party advocating social freedoms, economic reform, and political pluralism. Karroubi ran for president again under the party's banner in 2009. After the disputed election result and the [Green Movement](/events/green-movement-protests-2009), the party's leadership was suppressed and Karroubi himself was placed under house arrest.
editorial_notes: Founded 2005 by Karroubi after his 3rd-place finish in that year's presidential election. Karroubi served as Secretary-General. Activities effectively ended with Karroubi's house arrest in 2011.
